primary_family: Pretendard, -apple-system, system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Segoe UI", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

h1.family: Pretendard, -apple-system, "system-ui", system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Segoe UI", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h2.family: Pretendard, -apple-system, "system-ui", system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Segoe UI", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h3.family: Pretendard, -apple-system, "system-ui", system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Segoe UI", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

note: No bundled web-font on /. Pretendard is loaded via OS-installed fallback chain; system Korean fallback (Apple SD Gothic Neo / Noto Sans KR / Malgun Gothic) takes over per OS.
